label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Company in Jurisdiction of Organization)
rationale: LLC's legal name in its home (foreign) jurisdiction.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...the proposed name to be used in this State in compliance with this requirement is
rationale: Alternate name used in Maine when home name lacks an LLC suffix per 31 MRSA §1508.1.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the fictitious name under which it seeks authority to conduct activities in the State of Maine is
rationale: Fictitious name used in Maine when home name is unavailable per 31 MRSA §1508.

label_verbatim: Form FICT-4 accompanies this application. (See 31 MRSA §1624.1)
rationale: Boolean indicating Form FICT-4 (fictitious name) is bundled.
Date the LLC was originally formed in its home jurisdiction.

label_verbatim: Address of the principal office, wherever located: (physical location - street, city, state, zip and country)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the principal office (may be outside Maine).
Optional mailing address of the principal office.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The nature of the business or purpose(s) to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is
rationale: Free-text description of activities to be conducted in Maine.

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box - street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Maine physical address of the registered agent.
Maine SOS CRA Public Number (commercial path only).
Page-null checkbox; inferred from missing SIXTH commercial radio. Enum value 'commercial'.
First manager name (3-row table). Index suffix supports up to 3 inline managers; further go on Exhibit per Check Box23.

label_verbatim: [ ] Names and addresses of additional managers are attached as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Boolean opt-in for an additional-managers exhibit.

label_verbatim: NINTH: ...commenced or expects to commence conducting activities in the State of Maine is ___
rationale: Inline date blank for NINTH; chosen over EIGHTH-Exhibit interpretation based on y-coordinate gap below the EIGHTH checkbox row. Note: the EIGHTH 'Exhibit ___' widget may be missing.

label_verbatim: TENTH: [ ] This is a professional limited liability company qualified pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A
rationale: Boolean elect-in for foreign professional LLC.

label_verbatim: ELEVENTH: (Check if applicable) [ ] The foreign limited liability company is governed by an agreement that establishes ... designated series ...
rationale: Boolean elect-in for series LLC structure (per 31 MRSA §1622.2,3).

label_verbatim: ELEVENTH: ...attached hereto as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for series-LLC information.

label_verbatim: (Authorized Signature**) / (Type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of authorized signer.
